---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis - jtrain3"
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## Load data

```{r}
data <- read_excel("../data/jtrain3.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    re78 = as.numeric(re78),
    re75 = as.numeric(re75),
    re74 = as.numeric(re74),
    train = as.numeric(train),
    educ = as.numeric(educ),
    age = as.numeric(age)
  )

glimpse(data)
summary(data)
```

# Part 1 - Exploratory Data Analysis

## a) Summary statistics

```{r}
data %>%
  select(re78, train, re74, re75, educ, age) %>%
  summary()
```

## b) Average re78 by training status

```{r}
aggregate(re78 ~ train, data = data, mean)
```

## c) Distribution of re78 by training status

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(train), y = re78)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "1978 earnings by training status",
    x = "Training status",
    y = "Real earnings in 1978"
  )
```

## d) Pre-treatment comparability

```{r}
data %>%
  group_by(train) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_re74 = mean(re74, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_re75 = mean(re75, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_educ = mean(educ, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_re74 = sd(re74, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_re75 = sd(re75, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_educ = sd(educ, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_age = sd(age, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(train), y = re74 + 1)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "1974 earnings by training status",
    x = "Training status",
    y = "Real earnings in 1974"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(train), y = re75 + 1)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "1975 earnings by training status",
    x = "Training status",
    y = "Real earnings in 1975"
  )
```
